headline: A quiet, growing circle.
lede: We pooled the first cheque in August 2023 — two friends, one conviction. Every opportunity since has closed by invitation: no advertising, no brokers, no cold outreach. The circle grows because investors bring the next investor.

milestones.label: First pool
milestones.note: Two founding investors — friends trusting an idea.

milestones.label: 2 projects live
milestones.note: Capital in escrow · first NRI investor joins.

milestones.label: 3 projects live
milestones.note: Developer network widens · quarterly site reports go out.

footer: Tickets typically range ₹10 L – ₹2 Cr depending on the opportunity. Some deals register the asset directly in your name; others use a registered LLP partnership share. This is not a prospectus or investment advice.
